description.en: DQN joined deep neural networks with reinforcement learning and made Atari a landmark benchmark. The agent learned values directly from pixels using experience replay and a target network, reaching strong performance across multiple games. It became a central bridge from classic RL to deep RL.
description.zh: DQN 把深度神经网络与强化学习结合起来，让 Atari 成为标志性基准。智能体用经验回放和目标网络直接从像素学习价值函数，在多款游戏上取得强表现。它成为经典强化学习走向深度强化学习的关键桥梁。

html.en: Classic reinforcement learning had strong theory, but scaling from raw pixels to control remained difficult. DQN made that scaling visible.
html.zh: 经典强化学习有坚实理论，但从原始像素扩展到控制任务仍然困难。DQN 让这种扩展变得可见。

html.en: Experience replay breaks correlations in recent experience, while a target network stabilizes value updates.
html.zh: 经验回放打破近期经验的相关性，目标网络则稳定价值更新。

html.en: Experts generally treat DQN as the breakthrough that made deep reinforcement learning visible and concrete. Its long-term legacy is the neural loop connecting perception, action, reward, replay, and value learning, despite ongoing sample-efficiency and stability challenges.
html.zh: 专家通常把 DQN 视为让深度强化学习变得可见且具体的突破。它的长期影响在于把感知、行动、奖励、经验回放和价值学习接成神经循环，尽管样本效率和稳定性问题仍存在。

method.en: Q-learning with convolutional networks, replay, and target networks
method.zh: 结合卷积网络、经验回放与目标网络的 Q 学习

artifact.zh: 能玩 Atari 的深度 Q 网络

material.en: arXiv paper, Nature paper, and DeepMind blog
material.zh: arXiv 论文、《自然》 论文与 DeepMind 博客

demo.en: Pixels enter replay; Q-values choose actions
demo.zh: 像素进入回放；Q 值选择动作

text.en: Past transitions are sampled again to make learning more stable and data-efficient.
text.zh: 过去转移会被再次采样，使学习更稳定也更省数据。

text.en: A delayed copy of the value network reduces moving-target instability.
text.zh: 价值网络的延迟副本减少移动目标的不稳定。

text.en: The network estimates future return for each action.
text.zh: 网络估计每个动作的未来回报。

description.en: Primary DeepMind DQN source; local images redraw replay memory and Q-value control.
description.zh: DeepMind DQN 原始来源；本地图重画回放记忆和 Q 值控制。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not reuse publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复用出版方图形。

label.en: Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning
label.zh: 用深度强化学习玩 Atari

label.en: Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning
label.zh: Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning
谷歌 DeepMind: Deep Reinforcement Learning
